steps.title: Write both mass equations
steps.content:
Convert each percent relationship into an equation.
$$A=3.84B$$
and
$$A=0.00048C$$

steps.title: Compare C to B
steps.content:
Set the two expressions for $A$ equal and solve for $C$.
$$3.84B=0.00048C$$
$$C=\frac{3.84}{0.00048}B$$
$$C=8{,}000B$$
